case_title: VERTEX PROPERTY GROUP VS. BRITTANY CALHOUN ET AL

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CALHOUN, BRITTANY AN INDIVIDUAL
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VERTEX PROPERTY GROUP AS TO DEFENDANT CALHOUN, BRITTANY AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VERTEX PROPERTY GROUP AS TO DEFENDANT CALHOUN, BRITTANY AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VERTEX PROPERTY GROUP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALHOUN, BRITTANY AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 424 ELLIS STREET, UNIT 509 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 69160863)
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CALHOUN, BRITTANY AN INDIVIDUAL
DECLARATION OF DAVID P WASSERMAN ESQ RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 69160863) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VERTEX PROPERTY GROUP

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 69160863), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF VERTEX PROPERTY GROUP SERVED JAN-22-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CALHOUN, BRITTANY AN INDIVIDUAL
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $53.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF VERTEX PROPERTY GROUP
